North Pacific Gyre Oscillation: NPGO Monthly
Last update feb 2025 by csmith
using SSHa from AVISO Near Real Time product
Di Lorenzo et al., 2008: North Pacific Gyre Oscillation
links ocean climate and ecosystem change, GRL.
provided by NOAA/PSL at https://psl.noaa.gov/data/timeseries/month/
source https://www.npgo.org/data/NPGO.txt
